title: Fiji 2-Day Beach Getaway
metaTitle: Fiji 2-Day Beach Getaway | Flights, Hotels & Tours Included
metaDescription: Book a 2-day trip to Fiji, Fiji: round-trip flights, hotel, breakfast, transfers, and guided tours including Cloud 9 floating pontoon and Sabeto Hot Springs & Mud Pool. Prices from $1715 per person (estimate).
highlights: Scuba diving at the Great Astrolabe Reef
Private overwater villa at a Mamanuca or Yasawa resort
Overwater bure stay in the Mamanuca Islands
overview: Spend 2 days discovering Fiji, Fiji — Tropical climate with a warm, wetter season carrying cyclone risk (Nov-Apr) and a cooler, drier season with pleasant trade winds (May-Oct). May to October, the dry season, for cooler temperatures, lower humidity, and calmer seas. This itinerary blends Cloud 9 floating pontoon, Sabeto Hot Springs & Mud Pool, Nadi Municipal Market with free time to explore at your own pace, backed by round-trip flights, handpicked accommodation, and a dedicated travel consultant from enquiry through departure.
included: Round-trip economy-class airfare from your selected origin city (upgrade to premium economy or business available)
1 night accommodation in your selected category (Budget, Mid-range, Premium, or Luxury)
Daily local transport as per the itinerary
Guided tours including Cloud 9 floating pontoon, Sabeto Hot Springs & Mud Pool, Nadi Municipal Market
All entrance fees for attractions and activities listed in the itinerary
Applicable taxes and OTA service fee
Dedicated travel consultant support from booking through departure
notIncluded: Visa fees and travel document costs (see Visa Information)
Travel insurance (strongly recommended, available as an add-on)
Lunches and dinners except where noted in the itinerary
Optional activities not listed in the day-by-day itinerary
Airline seat selection and baggage upgrades
Any fare difference for premium economy or business class upgrades

itinerary.title: Arrive in Fiji
itinerary.description: Land at Nadi International Airport (NAN) and take your included private transfer to your hotel. With limited time on the ground, head straight out to Cloud 9 floating pontoon — Overwater pizza and cocktail platform in the lagoon. Round off the evening with a welcome dinner introducing you to local flavors.

itinerary.title: Fiji Highlights & Departure
itinerary.description: Start early with a visit to Sabeto Hot Springs & Mud Pool — Natural hot springs and volcanic mud bathing. Grab a last taste of local life before your private transfer to NAN for your onward flight.

travelTips: Bring a small gift or cash for a sevusevu if visiting a traditional village
Book inter-island ferry or flight transfers in advance during peak season
Expect "Fiji time" — build buffer into any tight schedules
Tap water is generally safe at Nadi/Denarau resorts but stick to bottled water in remote areas
With a short stay, book your must-see attractions in advance to avoid losing time to queues.
packingList: Copies of booking confirmations and travel insurance
Lightweight, breathable clothing and a reusable water bottle
Reef-safe sunscreen for snorkeling and diving
A sulu or sarong for village visits
Lightweight tropical clothing plus a light rain layer for wet season
thingsToDo: Scuba diving at the Great Astrolabe Reef
Whitewater rafting on the Navua River
thingsToAvoid: Swimming or fishing near a village without permission
Wearing hats or sunglasses when entering a village
Traveling during cyclone season (Nov-Apr) without flexible plans
topRestaurants: Bulaccino Restaurant Nadi — International and Fijian ($$)
Tu's Place — Fijian curries and local dishes ($)
Cardo's Restaurant Denarau — Steak and grill ($$$)
Vilisite's Restaurant — Traditional Fijian lovo feast ($$)
Ocean Terrace Restaurant — International buffet and seafood ($$$)
Fare Manuia — Fijian and Pacific fusion ($$)
adventureActivities: Scuba diving at the Great Astrolabe Reef
Whitewater rafting on the Navua River
luxuryExperiences: Private overwater villa at a Mamanuca or Yasawa resort
Seaplane transfer to a private island resort
Private butler service at a five-star resort
honeymoonExperiences: Overwater bure stay in the Mamanuca Islands
Private beach dinner under the stars
Couples spa treatment with ocean views
budgetExperiences: Free public beach access along the Coral Coast
Village homestay with a sevusevu ceremony
Self-guided snorkeling from a public beach
localEtiquette: Remove hats and sunglasses when entering a traditional village.
Wear a sulu (wraparound skirt) and cover shoulders when visiting a village.
Bring a small gift for a sevusevu (kava root offering) if invited to a village.
Ask permission before swimming or fishing near village-owned waters.
Participate respectfully in kava ceremonies, clapping once before and after drinking.
localTransportGuide: Resort areas rely on shuttle transfers, taxis, and rental cars for road trips along the Coral Coast. Inter-island travel is by small domestic flights (Fiji Airways/Fiji Link), catamaran ferries (South Sea Cruises), or seaplane to remote resorts.
bestTimeToVisit: May to October, the dry season, for cooler temperatures, lower humidity, and calmer seas.
weather: Tropical climate with a warm, wetter season carrying cyclone risk (Nov-Apr) and a cooler, drier season with pleasant trade winds (May-Oct).
visaInformation: Most tourist nationalities (US, UK, EU, Australia, New Zealand, Canada) can enter visa-free for stays of up to four months, provided the passport is valid and an onward ticket can be shown.
averageFlightTime: ~16.5h from major hubs (estimate; varies by origin — see Suggested Flights)
cancellationPolicy: Cancellations made 30+ days before departure: full refund minus a $99 processing fee. 15-29 days before departure: 50% refund. 0-14 days before departure or no-show: non-refundable. Airline and hotel supplier cancellation terms may be stricter than this policy and apply in addition — your travel consultant confirms exact terms before payment is taken. No online payment is collected on this site; a consultant confirms final pricing and availability with you directly before any booking is confirmed.
termsAndConditions: Pricing shown is per person based on the traveler type and tier selected and is an estimate pending live fare and rate confirmation.
Passports must be valid for at least 6 months beyond the return date for most destinations — confirm the exact requirement for your nationality.
Itinerary order may change due to weather, local conditions, or attraction closures; inclusions remain equivalent.
Solo travelers incur a single-room supplement, reflected in the Solo pricing tier.
This package does not include international travel insurance unless explicitly listed under Included.
Prices shown in a currency other than USD are approximate conversions at the rate noted and are not a payment quote.

faqs.question: Do I need a visa to visit Fiji?
faqs.answer: Most tourist nationalities (US, UK, EU, Australia, New Zealand, Canada) can enter visa-free for stays of up to four months, provided the passport is valid and an onward ticket can be shown.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit Fiji?
faqs.answer: May to October, the dry season, for cooler temperatures, lower humidity, and calmer seas. Tropical climate with a warm, wetter season carrying cyclone risk (Nov-Apr) and a cooler, drier season with pleasant trade winds (May-Oct).

faqs.question: What's included in this package?
faqs.answer: Round-trip airfare, accommodation, daily breakfast, airport transfers, daily local transport, and guided tours to the attractions listed in the itinerary. See the Included / Not Included sections for full detail.

faqs.question: Can the itinerary be customized?
faqs.answer: Yes — this itinerary is a starting point. Your travel consultant can add, remove, or reorder activities, extend your stay, or upgrade your hotel category before you book.

faqs.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: Cancellations made 30+ days before departure: full refund minus a $99 processing fee. 15-29 days before departure: 50% refund. 0-14 days before departure or no-show: non-refundable. Airline and hotel supplier cancellation terms may be stricter than this policy and apply in addition — your travel consultant confirms exact terms before payment is taken. No online payment is collected on this site; a consultant confirms final pricing and availability with you directly before any booking is confirmed.

faqs.question: Is Fiji safe for tourists?
faqs.answer: Fiji is generally safe for tourists who take standard precautions — avoid poorly lit areas at night, keep valuables secure, and use licensed transport.

faqs.question: What currency should I bring to Fiji?
faqs.answer: The local currency is FJD. Carry some cash for smaller vendors — card acceptance can be inconsistent outside major hotels and malls.

faqs.question: Is this package good for a honeymoon or family trip?
faqs.answer: Yes — Fiji is one of our most-booked honeymoon destinations, especially the Overwater bure stay in the Mamanuca Islands experience.

reviews.author: Yuki Nguyen
reviews.title: Beautiful destination, well organized
reviews.body: Nadi town street murals alone was worth the trip, but combined with Village visit & kava ceremony tour this itinerary really delivered. Breakfast at the hotel was good every day and the local guide was knowledgeable.

reviews.author: Lucas Khan
reviews.title: Best vacation we've had
reviews.body: Everything was handled for us — flights, hotel, transfers, and tours to Kula Wild Adventure Park and Coral Coast scenic viewpoints. Great communication from the consultant before departure too.

reviews.author: Ethan Sharma
reviews.title: Amazing itinerary, zero stress
reviews.body: Everything was handled for us — flights, hotel, transfers, and tours to Shark diving Pacific Harbour and Village visit & kava ceremony tour. Great communication from the consultant before departure too.

reviews.author: Emma Andersen
reviews.title: Amazing itinerary, zero stress
reviews.body: Our trip to Fiji was fantastic from start to finish. The hotel was clean and well located, and the guided visit to Robinson Crusoe Island day trip was a real highlight. Airport transfers were on time both ways.

reviews.author: Chen Patel
reviews.title: Beautiful destination, well organized
reviews.body: Booked this as a solo trip and it was well paced. Sigatoka Sand Dunes National Park in particular stood out. A couple of the transfers ran a little late but nothing that spoiled the trip.

reviews.author: Grace Sharma
reviews.title: Solid mid-range package
reviews.body: We added a couple of optional activities beyond Robinson Crusoe Island day trip and don't regret it. Good value for what was included, and the food recommendations from our guide were spot on.

reviews.author: Arjun Fernandez
reviews.title: Perfect for our honeymoon
reviews.body: Booked this as a family of 4 trip and it was well paced. Coral Coast scenic viewpoints in particular stood out. A couple of the transfers ran a little late but nothing that spoiled the trip.

reviews.author: Mia Costa

reviews.body: Everything was handled for us — flights, hotel, transfers, and tours to Sabeto Hot Springs & Mud Pool and Coral Coast scenic viewpoints. Great communication from the consultant before departure too.
